addToInvite.description: Button text for the button which adds files to the invite

attachModalTitle.description: Title for the modal when attaching files

authErrorGenericDescription.description: Description text displayed when login fails for an unknown reason
authErrorGenericDescription.message: It looks like we’re having issues—mind trying that again? If you keep having trouble, $1.

authErrorGenericRefreshButton.description: Button text which will refresh the page

authErrorGenericTitle.description: Title of modal displayed when login fails for an unknown reason

authErrorNetworkDescription.description: Description text displayed when the user could not connect to Figma to login
authErrorNetworkDescription.message: You may need to check your connection, then try again. If you keep having trouble, $1.

authErrorNetworkRetryButton.description: Button text which will retry login

authErrorNetworkTitle.description: Title of modal displayed when the user could not connect to Figma to login

calButtonFigjam.description: Button text for the button on the Calendar invite which enters the FigJam flow

calButtonFigmaDesign.description: Button text for the button on the Calendar invite which enters the Figma Design flow

calButtonMore.description: Dropdown to add more files after the initial time

calExpandButton.description: This is the text for the expand button in the file list

calExpandButtonCollapse.description: This is the text for the expand button in the file list (when already expanded)

calLoadingState.description: Text shown in the calendar invite when we are adding files to the invite

cancelButton.description: Button text for cancel buttons, which go back to the previous page

createFilesErrorBellText.description: Text shown in a visual bell when we fail to create a file

createModalTitle.description: Title for the modal when creating files

figjam.description: Button text for the button which opens a FigJam board

figmaDesign.description: Button text for the button which opens a Figma design

loginButton.description: Text displayed in the button that logs the user in

loginModalSubtext.description: Subtext shown on the login modal, which prompts the user to login with Figma
loginModalSubtext.message: Set up brainstorms, crits, and more—all in a snap. $1 lets you attach Figma and FigJam files directly to events in Google Calendar.

loginModalTitleText.description: Title text shown on the login modal, which prompts the user to login with Figma

logoutButton.description: Text displayed in the button that logs the user out

modalStatusFilesJoin.description: When more than 1 file is selected, this joins the file names together. Ex. File1 and File2

modalStatusFilesSuffix.description: When 1 or more files are selected, this text is shown after the file names. Ex. 3 or more files will be added to the event invite.
modalStatusFilesSuffix.message: will be added to the event invite.

modalStatusNoFiles.description: When no files are selected, this is the string which instructs the user to select files in the picker.
modalStatusNoFiles.message: Choose a few files to add.

nameLabel.description: Name field in the Create new file modal

newFigjam.description: Button text for the button which creates a new FigJam board

newFigmaDesign.description: Button text for the button which creates a new Figma file

noFilesFound.description: Text shown in the file picker when searching for a file yields empty results

recentFilesErrorDescription.description: Description of the modal when we fail to fetch the user's recent files
recentFilesErrorDescription.message: It looks like we’re having issues—mind trying that again? If you keep having trouble, $1.

recentFilesErrorRetryButton.description: Button text which will try to fetch recent files again

recentFilesErrorTitle.description: Title of the modal when we fail to fetch the user's recent files

signedInModalSubtext.description: Subtext shown on the modal when the user has signed in. The user sees their profile, and a sign out button
signedInModalSubtext.message: You’ve signed in to $1. To try it out, create a Google Calendar event—you’ll see a few new controls.

signedInModalTitleText.description: Title text shown on the modal when the user has signed in. The user sees their profile, and a sign out button

templatesExpandButton.description: Show more templates in the templates topbar

templatesHideButton.description: Hide additional templates in the templates topbar

templatesTitle.description: Templates header for the templates topbar
